description: Training+eval set pour Question Router classifier (Sprint S2 V4). Matrice 7 types × 10 domaines × 7 questions = 490q. Bilingue FR/EN. Aucune contamination des benchmarks RAGAS/T2T5/Robustness.

schema.question: string — text de la question utilisateur
schema.domain: regulatory | it_cloud | medical | legal | finance | hr | scientific | education | manufacturing | retail
schema.primary_type: factual | list | temporal | comparison | causal | unanswerable | false_premise

qualifiers.is_meta_question: bool — about the system itself / KG
